question: Where do your best ideas actually arrive?
dek: Not where you're supposed to have them. Where they actually show up, unannounced.

options.label: Walking · no destination
options.hint: that loop you do · hands in pockets · the brain opens

options.label: In the shower · water on the face
options.hint: no pen · nothing to write with · you'll remember this time

options.label: 3am · eyes closed · mouth open
options.hint: the ceiling speaking · phone notes at your worst

options.label: Driving · between two errands
options.hint: radio low · the merge before the merge · suddenly the whole thing

options.label: Right before sleep · phone across the room
options.hint: the border crossing · where the good stuff lives

options.label: Second coffee · after the first email
options.hint: the first pass drained out · something clearer underneath

outcomeAction: Leading arrival shape gets a paired workbench block — how-to-catch-it.
author: mike
source: chat 2026-04-20 — zeitgeist cluster: creative-ritual · pairs with the workbench sprint
